commit.message:
Lazy scope type resolution for intellisense performance (#281)

* Lazy scope type resolution for intellisense performance

Replace eager scope type resolution in inspectScopeType with a lazy
approach using LazyScopeTypeByKey. Previously, autocomplete resolved all
676+ scope items upfront (4.5s on large files like Kusto.pq). Now types
are resolved on-demand — only the items actually needed for a given
intellisense operation are computed.

ScopeTypeByKey is a base class with empty/no-op defaults and a frozen
singleton via ScopeTypeByKey.empty. LazyScopeTypeByKey extends it with
deferred resolution: resolveType() checks a cache then calls a resolver
closure, resolveAll() batch-resolves via Promise.all, and async
iterators (entries, values, forEach) resolve-then-delegate.

Includes 15 unit tests covering lazy semantics, caching, concurrent
resolution, async iteration, and error propagation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* upgrading package version

* inline to prevent footgun

---------

Co-authored-by: Jordan Bolton (jobolton) <jobolton@microsoft.com>

commit.message:
Fix stale executions permanently blocking concurrency=forbid jobs (#1947)

* Initial plan

* Fix stale execution cleanup for concurrency=forbid jobs

When a running execution gets stuck in persistent storage (e.g., due to
node crash or gRPC failure), it permanently blocks jobs with
concurrency=forbid from running.

The fix cross-references storage-based running executions with in-memory
active executions. If an execution is in storage but not active in memory
and has been running longer than DefaultStaleExecutionThreshold (4 hours),
it is automatically cleaned up by marking it as failed via Raft.

Co-authored-by: vcastellm <47026+vcastellm@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address code review: use UTC times consistently, improve error logging

fix: picker drawer overlap with single result

Float truncation in overlay.rs: (72.8 / 18.2) as usize = 3 instead
of 4 due to f32 precision loss from subtraction (panel_bottom -
panel_top). This made available_lines=3, num_visible=0, causing the
status line and result to render at the same y coordinate.

Fix: round to nearest integer instead of truncating.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Bloom
repository.description: A local-first, Vim-modal note editor for networked thinking. Built in Rust.

commit.message:
fix: indexer never writes files, vault-wide block ID uniqueness

Remove block ID assignment from the indexer thread — it was writing
directly to disk via atomic_write(), bypassing the self-write hash
guard and causing false reload prompts.

Block IDs are now assigned only when a file is open in the editor,
via ensure_block_ids() on Insert→Normal transitions. Files without
IDs are indexed as-is.

Also adds vault-wide collision avoidance:
- BloomEditor.known_block_ids cache, refreshed on IndexComplete
- compute_block_id_assignments() accepts optional known IDs set
- New IDs inserted into cache immediately on assignment

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Bloom
repository.description: A local-first, Vim-modal note editor for networked thinking. Built in Rust.

commit.message:
refactor: centralize autosave as debounced timer

Replace 4 scattered autosave_if_dirty() calls with a single
schedule_autosave() at the end of handle_key(). Uses buffer's
existing is_dirty() (version != clean_version) to detect mutations.

- handle_key() = handle_key_inner() + schedule_autosave()
- 300ms debounce: rapid edits/undo/redo coalesce into one save
- Insert mode suppressed (fires on Insert→Normal transition)
- save_page() clears deadline to prevent redundant flush
- Removes undo/redo-specific deadline special cases

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: suppress false reload prompts during undo/redo

Two-part fix for file watcher echoing our own saves back as external
changes:

1. Content-hash self-write detection: hash every save, suppress watcher
   events whose disk content matches a stored hash (bounded deque of 8).

2. Undo/redo autosave debounce: set 300ms deadline instead of saving
   immediately, coalescing rapid undo sequences into a single write.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: Bloom
repository.description: A local-first, Vim-modal note editor for networked thinking. Built in Rust.

commit.message:
feat: undo delta persistence with keyframe support

Store EditDelta (offset, delete_len, insert_text) per undo node instead
of full buffer content. Every 50th node stores a keyframe (full text)
bounding chain length. BFS restore on load reconstructs Ropey structural
sharing. Backward compatible with existing all-content format.

Storage: ~25 MB → ~540 KB for reference vault (20 pages × 500 nodes).

Also adds lab design docs for block ID metadata and undo delta stress
testing (18 correctness scenarios, 5 failure modes).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
优化: 字幕默认选择改为优先内嵌字幕，再回退外置字幕

原逻辑：优先外置字幕（外置 → 内嵌兜底 index=0）
新逻辑：优先第一条内嵌字幕 → 无内嵌时选第一条外置字幕 → 都无则不显示

findPreferredTrackIndex() 在基类 SubtitleBridgeAdapterBase，
AVPlayer 和 ijkplayer 路径均继承该方法，一次修改两路同时生效。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

优化: 内嵌字幕轨道去掉"内嵌字幕 N"前缀，直接显示语言描述信息

外部字幕已有 [外部·SRT] 标识，内嵌字幕去掉冗余前缀后可展示更多有效信息。
- IjkSubtitleBridgeAdapter：直接使用 buildSubtitleTrackDisplayName() 返回值
  如 "中文 (ASS) 简体"、"英语 (SRT)"
- AvSubtitleBridgeAdapter：直接使用语言名称，无语言时退回 "字幕 N"

示例："内嵌字幕 1 (中文 (ASS) 简体)" 而非仅显示 "内嵌字幕 1 (中文)"

commit.message:
修复: 内嵌字幕 ASS 解析 — 检测 Dialogue 冒号格式，跳 9 逗号提取 Text 字段

根因：rect->ass 是含乱码'Dialogue'单词的完整行格式：
  <garbled>: Layer,Start,End,Style,Name,0,0,0,Effect,Text
上一版本检测第一字段是否为数字，无法匹配此格式，导致原始 ASS 元数据字符串透传显示。

修复逻辑（parseAssIfNeeded）：
1. 优先查找 ': '（冒号+空格）→ 跳过 9 个逗号到 Text 字段
2. 回退：第一字段为纯数字（MKV 包格式）→ 跳 8 个逗号
3. 无法识别结构（清除信号/垃圾包）→ 返回空字符串清除字幕

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(theming): Full Skins & Themes Implementation (#369) (#528)

* feat(theming): Full Skins & Themes implementation (#369)

Wave 1 - Core Theme Fidelity:
- ThemeMode enum (StyleSheetTheme/Theme) with dual-mode ApplyThemeSkin
- Sub-component style theming (SubStyles on ControlSkin, SkinBuilder.SubStyle())
- 5 data controls override ApplyThemeSkin: GridView, DetailsView, FormView, DataGrid, DataList
- Container-level EnableTheming propagation via ancestor chain walk
- Runtime theme switching via ThemeProvider Mode parameter
- Fix generic type name lookup (GridView1 -> GridView) for theme skin matching

Wave 2 - Migration Accelerators:
- .skin file parser (SkinFileParser) - reads Web Forms .skin files into ThemeConfiguration
- JSON theme format (JsonThemeLoader) - load/save themes as JSON with custom converters
- CSS file bundling - ThemeProvider renders <link> elements via HeadContent

Wave 3 - Diagnostics:
- ThemeDiagnostics with validation rules for unknown controls, sub-styles, empty skins
- Runtime SkinID mismatch logging in BaseWebFormsComponent

Tests: 120 theming tests (72 Wave 1 + 48 Wave 2), 2685 total tests passing
Docs: themes-and-skins.md with migration guide, API reference, quick start

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Migration is now: copy App_Themes/ to wwwroot/App_Themes/ — zero extra lines needed.

pdf-object: implement ASCII85Decode filter

Add `Filter::ASCII85Decode` variant, map the `"ASCII85Decode"` name in
the `From` impl, and implement `Filter::decode_ascii85` using Horner's
method with wrapping arithmetic. Wire it into `StreamObject::data()`.

Includes 7 unit tests covering full groups, the `z` shorthand, partial
final groups, whitespace skipping, the `~>` EOD marker, and invalid
character errors.

feat: initial implementation of instant-payment-handler service

- Consumes routed Instant Payment messages from payment.engine.topic
- Filters by 'payment-type' header — skips non-Instant Payment messages
- Randomly assigns PAIN 002 status: ACTC (40%) | RGTC (30%) | SCHD (20%) | PDNG (10%)
- Publishes PaymentStatusMessage to payment.status.topic with headers:
    transaction-status, handler-message-id, original-message-id, payment-type
- MDC context: traceId, paymentId, handlerId=IPH-<UUID> on every message
- Structured logback pattern with console (ANSI) and rolling file appender
- Port: 8083
